creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->feedback

Upon further investigation, it would seem that the originator 
was referring to ports/lang/o2c, which begs the questions: 

What is the difference between lang/o2c and lang/oo2c? 
Was PR#18215 meant as an update to o2c, and just wrongly packaged? 
What is the meaning of life? 
Can we just axe the now-outdated lang/o2c? 
Should we drop lang/oo2c and and bring lang/o2c up-to-date?
